commit_message:
Make serv_alu.v synthesizable with Vivado Make serv_alu.v synthesizable with Vivado Currently, `serv_alu.v` uses the one-bit unsized literal `'0` which Vivado doesn't support unless a `.sv` file extension is used.

To recreate the error, run `fusesoc run --tool=vivado serv --pnr=none --part=xc7a100tcsg324-1`. Synthesis should terminate with an error.

This change resolves the Xilinx synthesis error.
